debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) ⇑f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖

failed_attempts:
rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_apply]
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
    ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe, ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
  exact le_trans (le_opNorm _ f)
    (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg f))

rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure]
  refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_norm_mul_norm_top _ _) ?_
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (norm_nonneg f)
  rw [ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]
  refine le_trans (ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_comp_le _ _) ?_
  simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap]
  have h_iso : ‖(@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap‖ = 1 :=
    LinearIsometryEquiv.norm_toContinuousLinearMap _
  rw [h_iso, mul_one]
  exact cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y

rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure]
  let L := @ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : ⇑f = ⇑(L f) := rfl

let ψ := cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y
  let J := (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
    (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
      ≤ ‖cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_norm _ _
    _ = ‖ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure (ψ.comp J.toContinuousLinearMap)‖ * ‖f‖ := rfl
    _ = ‖ψ.comp J.toContinuousLinearMap‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]
    _ ≤ ‖ψ‖ * ‖J.toContinuousLinearMap‖ * ‖f‖ := by
      gcongr
      apply ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_comp_le
    _ ≤ ‖ψ‖ * 1 * ‖f‖ := by
      gcongr
      apply LinearIsometry.norm_toContinuousLinearMap_le
    _ = ‖ψ‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := by
      gcongr
      exact cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y

let iso := @ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f = cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f := by
    have : ⇑f = ⇑(iso f) := rfl
    rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, this, ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_apply]
    simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
      ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
  rw [h]
  apply le_trans (ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _)
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound _ _ _) (norm_nonneg _)

rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_apply]
  simp
  apply le_trans (le_opNorm _ f)
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg f)

let L := (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _)
  have h : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f = cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f := by

refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_norm_mul_norm _ _) ?_
  rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]
